summary: campaign-C Task 5 (method diagrams) PASS (9/10, ready) at round 4. Built 7 R1-compliant .diagram-frame method diagrams (DIAGRAM-STYLE.md) on resid-rep2text, resid-gelo, resid-split, resid-dp-attacks, kv-cloak, embed-sgt, bnn-attack; bnn-attack also restyled off its inline stylesheet onto css/site.css (canonical topnav already present; trimmed page-local style keeps the interactive canvas figures + swatch/bar/col-width classes; masthead wrapped). Each diagram: trust-zone bands + labeled actors, release boundary with the crossing object named, numbered sequence, both measurement-loop arms (attack->recovery in box-warn AND probe->bits annotated 'no attack'), defense-parameter locus, every arrow typed+labeled, house-palette classes only. D3 v7 vendored at docs/html/js/d3.v7.min.js (diagrams static; vendored for later step-through). Round-1->4 fixes: rep2text length-axis factual correction + probe box-warn removal + probe-arm origin from released h; gelo probe arrow reversed + removed fabricated feature-Gram->BSS dependency (faithfulness) + numbered probe + 'no attack'; embed-sgt expanded Vec2Text into base-inversion + correct(T rounds) loop with cosine accept, probe box recolored to box-gpu to match its zone; split/dp added dashed train-vs-infer lanes for learned attacks; kv box-mono warn->box-sub + numbered BSS/probe; .warn reserved to leak/recovery targets only across all pages; bnn public-table box->box-client (zone match), all static inline chrome moved to .ctl-wide/.ctl-hint/.dotmark.is-*/.bar/.w21/.w34 classes (only the JS-computed bar width stays inline). Non-blocking polish noted: a few SVGs lack role=img/aria-label (outside R1). Cleanup pass: /humanize (2 fixes) + /proofread + /term-audit clean. No GPU, no new claim node.
